name: @metorial/pinecone
description: Manage vector database indexes and perform vector operations for AI applications. Create, configure, and delete serverless or pod-based indexes. Upsert, query, fetch, update, and delete vector embeddings with metadata filtering and namespace partitioning. Generate embeddings and rerank results using hosted inference models. Upload documents and chat with an AI assistant for RAG-based Q&A with citations. Bulk import data from cloud storage, create backups and collections, and manage organizational resources like projects, API keys, and service accounts.
